email_subject: How Acme Corp can cut revenue reporting time by 70%
email_draft:
Hi Sarah,

I noticed Acme Corp raised a $12M Series B in February and is now expanding into EMEA — congrats on the momentum.

As your RevOps team scales across regions, consolidating revenue data from Salesforce, billing tools, and spreadsheets becomes a real bottleneck. DataPulse connects to your existing stack in under 30 minutes and gives your team a live view of ARR, churn, and pipeline health — no SQL or engineering lift required.

One of our customers, TechFlow, used DataPulse to grow from $1M to $5M ARR with a two-person RevOps team.

Would a 20-minute demo make sense this week?

Best,
[Your Name]
